subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O Thou Who art the Lord of the nations, Who shinest effulgent from the horizon of eternity in Thy Most Great Name! I beseech Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا مالک الامم و المستشرق من افق البقاء باسمک الاعظم اسئلک بعظمتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
